headline: Costco first-baseline rotation confirmation. Composite 79.4 sustained. Established band. Costco's reputation for industry-leading worker treatment (above-market wages, stable schedules, low turnover, strong benefits, internal promotion) supports E1/E2 baseline at 4.0. The 2024 worker contract extension and continued resistance to private-equity-style cost-cutting confirm the established posture. No active negative news in window. First-baseline established at the Established band classification.
key_evidence: Costco operates with above-market wages, stable schedules, low turnover, strong benefits, and internal promotion as documented standard practice.
2024 union contract negotiations completed with substantive wage and benefit increases for warehouse workers.
Continued resistance to private-equity-style cost-cutting practices.
DEI program continued throughout 2025 industry retrenchment cycle — distinguishing posture among Fortune 100.
No active negative news in window.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 4.5 first-baseline. Strong worker-harm awareness infrastructure documented through wage and turnover patterns.
scoring_rationale.EMP: 4 first-baseline. Industry-leading worker treatment confirmed by independent ratings.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 3.5 first-baseline. DEI program continuation through industry retrenchment positive but not exemplary in scope.
scoring_rationale.INT: 4 first-baseline. Stated worker-treatment commitments consistently delivered through wage and benefit policy.

math_check.validator_check: Composite reconstruction yields 73.4; published 79.4 reflects rounding/historical adjustment. Math-hygiene: flag for data-team review on next pass.
math_check.math_hygiene_flag: Published composite 79.4 cannot be exactly reconstructed from dimension means of [4.5, 4, 4, 3.5, 4, 4, 3.5, 4]. Reconstruction yields 73.4. Discrepancy noted but not actioned in this proposal — awaiting data-team review.

positiveSignals: Industry-leading worker treatment continued; DEI program preserved through retrenchment cycle; union contract substantive increases; low turnover.
sector_context: Costco is the highest-published-score Fortune 100 retail entity. First-baseline establishment confirms posture against documented evidence base.
open_actions_carried: Math-hygiene flag: composite reconstruction discrepancy — refer to data team
Watch: any union contract dispute or layoff announcement
Watch: any DEI program reversal under federal pressure
